verses.text: Ka nu' sung pana piang ka sanggampa hi lecin kei ka ut hi. Tua hi leh, lamkalah hong tuak taleng zong kong tawptawp ding a, kuamah in phamawh salo ding hi
Keima pian'na ka nu' inndei sungah nang kong paipih ding a, tua lai-ah nong kawi ding hi. Tua lai-ah leenggahzu lim, mang kawlsing tui, kong tulh ding hi
A veilam khut hong khamsak a, a taklam khutin hong kawi hi
Jerusalem nungakte aw, ko' kingaihna nong suknawi lohna dingun kei tungah hong kiciam un.
Gamlak panin a lawmpa tawh khut kilensa-in a hong paikhia kua ahi hiam?
Kei simloh kuamah ngai kei in la, kei simloh kuamah kawi kei in. Itna zong sihna zahin thahat a, ngaihna zong sihna zahin khauh hi. Itna, mei bangin kuangkhia a, meikuang lianpen a suak hi
Tui tampi nangawn tawh kisumit zolo a, tui sungah i phumcip hangin mitzo tuanlo hi. Mi khat in a neihsa sum khempeuh tawh itna a lei dingin hong kithawi leh kinuihsan lel ding hi.
Sanggam numeino khat ka nei uh a, a nawite neu mahmah hi. Tangval khat in hong hel zenzen leh ka sanggamnu uh bangci huh ding ka hi uh hiam
Amah khua umna kulh hi leh, ngun kibawl tausang tawh ka hu ding uh a, amah kulhkongpi hi leh, taamtak singpekte tawh ka dal ding uh hi.
Kei, khuakulh ka hi a, ka nawite, a tausang ahi hi. Limtakin kei hong kihutna ka ngaihno in thei ding hi.
Baalhamon a kici munah Solomon in leenggui lo khat a nei hi. Amah in tua lo a kho dingin losapte sawl a, a lo-a piangte' man dingin losapte khat in ngun dangka tul khat ciat a piak ding uh ahi hi
Keimah in keima aituam leenggui lo khat ka nei hi. Solomon aw, na ngun dangka tul khat la in la, lokhote' tungah amau' tanh ding a zah nih pia in
Huan sunga om ka ngaihno aw, ka lawmte in hong ngai dide ahih manin nangma aw zong, hong gingsak dih in.
Ka ngaihno aw, sanang bangin, paknamtui kung a pona mun mualtunga om sakhitalno bangin kei kiangah hong pai in.
